```write_file
path: data_visualization_panel/app.py
---
import pandas as pd
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from plotly.subplots import make_subplots
import numpy as np
from flask import Flask, render_template_string
import os

app = Flask(__name__)

# 生成三组实验数据（模拟真实实验数据）
np.random.seed(42)
experiment_data = {
    'Control Group': np.random.normal(100, 15, 50),
    'Treatment A': np.random.normal(110, 12, 50),
    'Treatment B': np.random.normal(95, 18, 50)
}

# 创建DataFrame
df = pd.DataFrame(experiment_data)

def create_boxplot():
    """创建箱线图"""
    fig = go.Figure()
    
    colors = ['#1f77b4', '#ff7f0e', '#2ca02c']
    
    for i, (group, data) in enumerate(experiment_data.items()):
        fig.add_trace(go.Box(
            y=data,
            name=group,
            boxpoints='outliers',
            jitter=0.3,
            pointpos=-1.8,
            marker_color=colors[i],
            line_color=colors[i],
            fillcolor='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',
            marker=dict(size=6)
        ))
    
    fig.update_layout(
        title='实验数据箱线图对比',
        xaxis_title='实验组别',
        yaxis_title='测量值',
        template='plotly_white',
        font=dict(size=12),
        showlegend=True,
        height=500,
        width=800
    )
    
    return fig

def create_summary_stats():
    """创建汇总统计表"""
    stats_data = []
    for group, data in experiment_data.items():
        stats_data.append({
            '组别': group,
            '样本数': len(data),
            '平均值': round(np.mean(data), 2),
            '中位数': round(np.median(data), 2),
            '标准差': round(np.std(data), 2),
            '最小值': round(np.min(data), 2),
            '最大值': round(np.max(data), 2)
        })
    
    return pd.DataFrame(stats_data)
